attractions.name: Tipu Sultan's Summer Palace (Daria Daulat Bagh)
attractions.description: A teakwood masterpiece set amidst beautiful gardens — this palace offers insight into the life and rule of Tipu Sultan. Excellent for a relaxed first stop.
